name: File System Activity
description: Detects file access, creation, deletion, and modification via Object Access auditing and Sysmon. Requires 'Audit Object Access' policy and SACL on monitored files/folders. Sysmon Events 11/23 work without SACL configuration.
author: EventHawk (SANS/Microsoft/Sigma)

event_descriptions.4656: Handle to object requested — ObjectType, ObjectName, AccessMask, ProcessName
event_descriptions.4659: Handle to object requested with intent to delete
event_descriptions.4663: Attempt to access object — AccesMask indicates READ/WRITE/DELETE/EXECUTE
event_descriptions.4664: Attempt to create a hard link
event_descriptions.4670: Permissions on an object were changed
event_descriptions.11: Sysmon: File created — TargetFilename, Image, ProcessGuid, CreationUtcTime
event_descriptions.15: Sysmon: FileCreateStreamHash — alternate data stream created (ADS indicator)
event_descriptions.23: Sysmon: File deleted — archived to Sysmon archive directory
